title: PineShaders
description: Pine Shaders is a nature-themed edit of Complementary Shaders, offering soft lighting, greenish tones, and a peaceful, realistic vibe inspired by pine forests.
body:
### ABOUT

**Pine Shaders is a nature-themed shader pack inspired by the beauty of the natural world. Built as an edit of Complementary Shaders, it enhances the game’s visuals with lush lighting, soft shadows, and vibrant colors that bring nature to life. Every scene feels calm and organic — from glowing sunsets to gently waving leaves — making it perfect for players who love peaceful, realistic, and immersive environments..**



### Features

**Pine Shaders comes with customizable settings similar to Complementary, allowing you to switch the shader style from fantasy to realistic. It also features glowing clouds and many more advanced options for a personalized visual experience.**

### BUGS

**Found a bug? You can report it by creating a ticket under the bug category in our Discord server. Your feedback helps us improve Astral Core and fix issues faster. Every report means a lot to us and truly makes our day better!**

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c952a5d53a7af1439b21e9a934efd0ef66cf42a4.png)](https://discord.gg/TpsGTtTnSm)


**OFFER!!**

![offer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c2601c81bad72a543406e08506cd532288fc150.png)

### License

**Pine Shaders follows the Amethyst Shader License. It is published under the same license and fully complies with all the original rules and conditions set by Amethyst Groups. Proper credits and usage guidelines are strictly maintained.**
